name: @prune/batch-router
description: List1 batch-tier-router — route non-interactive work to the Batch API lane (provider rates ~0.5x). A mechanical per-request classifier: given caller-DECLARED signals (is the turn interactive? is there latency headroom? does the provider offer a batch lane?), decide batch vs interactive and quote the discounted cost. Deterministic; the demand-side commitment contract lives in @prune/futures-desk. No fabricated numbers, no regex, no model.
